name: "❄️ Architecture Decision"
description: "Propose or record an ADR"
title: "[ADR] "
labels: ["adr"]
assignees: []

body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ## ADR Template

        ### Status
        [ ] Proposed / [ ] Accepted / [ ] Deprecated / [ ] Superseded

        ### Context
        <!-- What is the situation? What constraints exist? -->

        ### Decision
        <!-- What was chosen and why? -->

        ### Consequences
        <!-- Trade-offs, risks, outcomes -->

        ### Alternatives Considered
        <!-- What else was evaluated? -->
